name: Shop Heroes
short_description: Join us in the long anticipated sequel to the classic Shop Heroes in Shop Legends, recently launched on Steam and now available across platform worldwide! Millions of shopkeepers awaits your return to Aragonia as endless adventures, events and more awaits your awakening!
detailed_description:
NOTICE: The sequel to the long anticipated hit game Shop Heroes, has recently been released worldwide and now available on Steam. Shop Legends contains all of the features that the classic game offers and much much more in terms of new systems, events, lore and expanded gameplay!

Shop Legends will be updated on a bi-weekly basis, with a roadmap spanning over the next 2 years in terms of updates and new features to be continously and regularly added! We hope for the community to rejoin us in the brand new Legends as other shopkeepers and Aragonia awaits yout awakening!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Turkish
